subject: Project pulse: parrot execution in Wellington | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-8541
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Wellington. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-8541. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
